summary.description: Production-ready Indian matrimonial platform with caste-aware matching, privacy safeguards, and scalable architecture

tables.name: users
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE,
  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  phone_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  is_banned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ban_reason TEXT,
  last_login_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  last_login_ip INET,
  device_fingerprint VARCHAR(255),
  fraud_score DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE
);

CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_phone ON users(phone);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_fraud_score ON users(fraud_score);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_created_at ON users(created_at);

tables.name: profiles
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE profiles (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  gender VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL CHECK (gender IN ('male', 'female', 'other')),
  date_of_birth DATE NOT NULL,
  age INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(date_of_birth))::INTEGER) STORED,
  height_cm INTEGER,
  religion VARCHAR(100),
  caste VARCHAR(100),
  caste_consent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  caste_consent_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  sub_caste VARCHAR(100),
  education VARCHAR(255),
  occupation VARCHAR(255),
  income_range VARCHAR(50),
  location_city VARCHAR(100),
  location_state VARCHAR(100),
  location_country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'India',
  location_pincode VARCHAR(10),
  latitude DECIMAL(10,8),
  longitude DECIMAL(11,8),
  marital_status VARCHAR(50) CHECK (marital_status IN ('never_married', 'divorced', 'widowed', 'awaiting_divorce')),
  diet VARCHAR(50) CHECK (diet IN ('vegetarian', 'non_vegetarian', 'eggetarian', 'vegan', 'jain')),
  smoking VARCHAR(50) CHECK (smoking IN ('never', 'occasionally', 'regularly', 'quit')),
  drinking VARCHAR(50) CHECK (drinking IN ('never', 'occasionally', 'regularly', 'quit')),
  languages TEXT[],
  about_me TEXT,
  profile_completion_percentage INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  verification_level INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  last_active_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  profile_views_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  is_featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  featured_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  is_boosted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  boost_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  astrology_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_user_id ON profiles(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_gender ON profiles(gender);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_age ON profiles(age);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_religion ON profiles(religion);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_caste ON profiles(caste) WHERE caste_consent = TRUE;
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_location_city ON profiles(location_city);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_location_state ON profiles(location_state);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_education ON profiles(education);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_occupation ON profiles(occupation);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_last_active ON profiles(last_active_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_verified ON profiles(is_verified);
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_age_gender ON profiles(age, gender);

tables.name: photos
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE photos (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  profile_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  s3_key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  s3_bucket VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  cdn_url VARCHAR(1000),
  is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  moderation_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (moderation_status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),
  moderation_notes TEXT,
  photo_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  uploaded_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  verified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE
);

CREATE INDEX idx_photos_profile_id ON photos(profile_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_photos_moderation_status ON photos(moderation_status);
CREATE INDEX idx_photos_primary ON photos(profile_id, is_primary);

tables.name: preferences
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE preferences (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  preferred_age_min INTEGER DEFAULT 21,
  preferred_age_max INTEGER DEFAULT 40,
  preferred_height_min INTEGER,
  preferred_height_max INTEGER,
  preferred_religions TEXT[],
  preferred_castes TEXT[],
  preferred_educations TEXT[],
  preferred_occupations TEXT[],
  preferred_locations TEXT[],
  preferred_marital_status TEXT[],
  preferred_diet TEXT[],
  preferred_smoking TEXT[],
  preferred_drinking TEXT[],
  preferred_languages TEXT[],
  preferred_income_min INTEGER,
  preferred_income_max INTEGER,
  max_distance_km INTEGER,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(user_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_preferences_user_id ON preferences(user_id);

tables.name: interests
matches
messages
shortlists
reports
verifications
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE verifications (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  verification_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (verification_type IN ('email', 'phone', 'government_id', 'video', 'address')),
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'submitted', 'verified', 'rejected')),
  document_s3_key VARCHAR(500),
  document_type VARCHAR(100),
  verification_data JSONB,
  verified_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  verified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  rejection_reason TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_verifications_user ON verifications(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_verifications_type ON verifications(verification_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_verifications_status ON verifications(status);

tables.name: fraud_scores
subscriptions
transactions
audit_logs
profile_views
refresh_tokens
otp_verifications
admin_users
video_calls
device_fingerprints
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE device_fingerprints (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  fingerprint_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_agent TEXT,
  screen_resolution VARCHAR(50),
  timezone VARCHAR(50),
  language VARCHAR(20),
  platform VARCHAR(100),
  first_seen_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_seen_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(fingerprint_hash, user_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_device_fingerprint ON device_fingerprints(fingerprint_hash);
CREATE INDEX idx_device_user ON device_fingerprints(user_id);

requirements.implementation: Explicit consent checkbox during registration with clear purpose description
Data used only for matchmaking and platform operations, not sold to third parties
Collect only necessary data, optional fields clearly marked
Profile export endpoint allowing users to download their data
Profile edit functionality for all user-provided data
Account deletion endpoint with 30-day recovery window
Defined retention periods, automatic deletion after retention expiry
Encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, audit logs
Dedicated privacy officer contact, response within 48 hours
Data stored in India, no transfer outside without explicit consent

dockerfiles.name: Dockerfile.api
dockerfiles.content:
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM node:20-alpine AS runner
WORKDIR /app
RUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs
RUN adduser --system --uid 1001 apiuser
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV PORT=3000
USER apiuser
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "dist/main.js"]

dockerfiles.name: Dockerfile.frontend
dockerfiles.content:
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:alpine AS runner
COPY --from=builder /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

dockerfiles.name: Dockerfile.astro_service
dockerfiles.content:
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
EXPOSE 8001
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8001"]

kubernetes_deployments.name: deployment.api.yaml
kubernetes_deployments.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-server
  labels:
    app: vivahbandhan
    component: api
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: vivahbandhan
      component: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: vivahbandhan
        component: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: vivahbandhan/api:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: production
        - name: DATABASE_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: db-credentials
              key: url
        - name: REDIS_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: redis-credentials
              key: url
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: jwt-secrets
              key: secret
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: vivahbandhan
    component: api
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 3000
  type: ClusterIP

kubernetes_deployments.name: deployment.frontend.yaml
kubernetes_deployments.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    app: vivahbandhan
    component: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: vivahbandhan
      component: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: vivahbandhan
        component: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: vivahbandhan/frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: vivahbandhan
    component: frontend
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: ClusterIP

kubernetes_deployments.name: deployment.opensearch.yaml
kubernetes_deployments.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: opensearch
  labels:
    app: vivahbandhan
    component: opensearch
spec:
  serviceName: opensearch
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: vivahbandhan
      component: opensearch
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: vivahbandhan
        component: opensearch
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: opensearch
        image: opensearchproject/opensearch:2.11.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9200
        - containerPort: 9600
        env:
        - name: cluster.name
          value: vivahbandhan-cluster
        - name: node.roles
          value: cluster_manager,data
        - name: discovery.seed_hosts
          value: "opensearch-0,opensearch-1,opensearch-2"
        - name: cluster.initial_cluster_manager_nodes
          value: "opensearch-0,opensearch-1,opensearch-2"
        - name: bootstrap.memory_lock
          value: "true"
        - name: OPENSEARCH_JAVA_OPTS
          value: "-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
        - name: DISABLE_INSTALL_DEMO_CONFIG
          value: "true"
        - name: DISABLE_SECURITY_PLUGIN
          value: "true"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "4Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: opensearch-data
          mountPath: /usr/share/opensearch/data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: opensearch-data
    spec:
      accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 50Gi

kubernetes_configmaps.name: configmap.app.yaml
kubernetes_configmaps.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: app-config
data:
  NODE_ENV: "production"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS: "60000"
  RATE_LIMIT_MAX: "100"
  JWT_EXPIRY: "900"
  REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRY: "604800"
  OTP_EXPIRY: "300"
  SEARCH_DAILY_LIMIT_FREE: "20"
  INTEREST_DAILY_LIMIT_FREE: "5"
  SHORTLIST_LIMIT_FREE: "50"

kubernetes_ingress.name: ingress.yaml
kubernetes_ingress.content:
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: vivahbandhan-ingress
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: nginx
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: letsencrypt-prod
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit: "100"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit-window: "1m"
spec:
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - vivahbandhan.com
    - api.vivahbandhan.com
    secretName: vivahbandhan-tls
  rules:
  - host: vivahbandhan.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: frontend-service
            port:
              number: 80
  - host: api.vivahbandhan.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: api-service
            port:
              number: 80

ci_cd_pipeline.name: .github/workflows/ci-cd.yaml
ci_cd_pipeline.content:
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME_API: ${{ github.repository }}/api
  IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND: ${{ github.repository }}/frontend

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
        cache: 'npm'
    
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci
    
    - name: Run linter
      run: npm run lint
    
    - name: Run tests
      run: npm run test:coverage
    
    - name: Upload coverage
      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
      with:
        files: ./coverage/lcov.info

  security-scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
      uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
      with:
        scan-type: 'fs'
        scan-ref: '.'
        severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
        exit-code: '1'
    
    - name: Run Snyk security scan
      uses: snyk/actions/node@master
      env:
        SNYK_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SNYK_TOKEN }}

  build-and-push:
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Log in to Container Registry
      uses: docker/login-action@v3
      with:
        registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
        username: ${{ github.actor }}
        password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    
    - name: Extract metadata
      id: meta
      uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
      with:
        images: |
          ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_API }}
          ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}
        tags: |
          type=sha,prefix=
          type=ref,event=branch
          type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    
    - name: Build and push API image
      uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
      with:
        context: ./packages/api
        push: true
        tags: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_API }}:latest,${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_API }}:${{ github.sha }}
    
    - name: Build and push Frontend image
      uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
      with:
        context: ./packages/frontend
        push: true
        tags: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}:latest,${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}:${{ github.sha }}

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build-and-push
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: staging
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up kubectl
      uses: azure/setup-kubectl@v3
    
    - name: Configure AWS credentials
      uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
      with:
        aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
        aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
        aws-region: ap-south-1
    
    - name: Update kubeconfig
      run: aws eks update-kubeconfig --name vivahbandhan-staging --region ap-south-1
    
    - name: Deploy to staging
      run: |
        kubectl set image deployment/api-server api=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_API }}:${{ github.sha }} -n staging
        kubectl set image deployment/frontend frontend=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}:${{ github.sha }} -n staging
        kubectl rollout status deployment/api-server -n staging
        kubectl rollout status deployment/frontend -n staging

  deploy-production:
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up kubectl
      uses: azure/setup-kubectl@v3
    
    - name: Configure AWS credentials
      uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
      with:
        aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
        aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
        aws-region: ap-south-1
    
    - name: Update kubeconfig
      run: aws eks update-kubeconfig --name vivahbandhan-production --region ap-south-1
    
    - name: Deploy to production
      run: |
        kubectl set image deployment/api-server api=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_API }}:${{ github.sha }} -n production
        kubectl set image deployment/frontend frontend=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}:${{ github.sha }} -n production
        kubectl rollout status deployment/api-server -n production
        kubectl rollout status deployment/frontend -n production

  integration-tests:
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Run integration tests
      run: |
        npm run test:integration
      env:
        API_URL: https://staging-api.vivahbandhan.com

authentication: Argon2id password hashing with minimum memory=64MB, iterations=3, parallelism=4
Refresh tokens with 7-day expiry, stored hashed in database
Refresh token rotation on each use
Rate limiting on authentication endpoints (10 per minute)
authorization: Role-based access control for admin functions
API endpoints require valid JWT token
Premium feature gating at API layer
input_validation: Input sanitization on all user inputs
SQL injection prevention via parameterized queries
XSS prevention via content security policy
infrastructure: WAF enabled on all public endpoints
Container image scanning in CI pipeline

deliverables: Project scaffolding (monorepo structure with packages/api, packages/frontend, packages/shared)
Fastify server skeleton with health check endpoints
React app initialization with TypeScript and TailwindCSS
CI/CD pipeline skeleton in GitHub Actions
User registration endpoint with Argon2 password hashing
Phone verification with OTP (placeholder for SMS gateway)
Photo upload to S3 with presigned URLs
Frontend search page with filter panel
